mnemonics.title: K-map Simplification Steps
mnemonics.content: 1. Identify minterms, 2. Group minterms, 3. Eliminate don't care conditions, 4. Simplify the function

acronyms.usage: A graphical technique for simplifying digital circuits

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a grid with rows and columns representing the variables and their complements

analogies.analogy: Simplifying a Boolean function is like finding the shortest path in a maze
